name: construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 subcontractor time sheets/month tool
description: For construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes payroll delays. We automate the conversion of time sheets into payroll reports instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
target_audience: construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 subcontractor time sheets/month
problem_solved: Manual processing of subcontractor time sheets leads to payroll delays.

locked_fields.primary_user: construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 subcontractor time sheets/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual processing of subcontractor time sheets leads to payroll delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes payroll delays. We automate the conversion of time sheets into payroll reports instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry into payroll systems

one_liner: For construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes payroll delays. We automate the conversion of time sheets into payroll reports instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
